ddls:
CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic data point */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Academic year the data was collected */,
  "american_indian_or_alaska_native" INTEGER /* Number of students who identified as American Indian or Alaska Native */,
  "asian_or_pacific_islander" INTEGER /* Number of students who identified as Asian or Pacific Islander */,
  "asian" INTEGER /* Number of students who identified as Asian */,
  "native_hawaiian_or_other_pacific_islander" INTEGER /* Number of students who identified as Native Hawaiian or Other Pacific Islander */,
  "black_or_african_american" INTEGER /* Number of students who identified as Black or African American */,
  "hispanic_or_latino" INTEGER /* Number of students who identified as Hispanic or Latino */,
  "white" INTEGER /* Number of students who identified as White */,
  "two_or_more_races" INTEGER /* Number of students who identified with two or more races */,
  "race_ethnicity_unknown" INTEGER /* Number of students whose race/ethnicity is unknown */,
  "nonresident_alien" INTEGER /* Number of students who are nonresident aliens */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* JSON column to store the distribution of students by gender */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* JSON column to store the distribution of students by age groups */,
  "international_students" INTEGER /* Number of international students */,
  "domestic_students" INTEGER /* Number of domestic students */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data point was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data point was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_american_indian_or_alaska_native FOREIGN KEY ("american_indian_or_alaska_native") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Name of the academic year (e.g., 2017-2018) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the academic year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the academic year */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the academic year was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the academic year was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the demographic category (e.g., American Indian or Alaska Native) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the demographic category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic department */,
  "dept_name" TEXT /* Name of the academic department (e.g., Computer Science) */,
  "college_id" INTEGER /* ID of the college the department belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the department was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the department was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dept_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_college_id FOREIGN KEY ("college_id") REFERENCES colleges ("college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colleges" (
  "college_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic college */,
  "college_name" TEXT /* Name of the academic college (e.g., College of Engineering) */,
  "univ_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university the college belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the college was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the college was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("college_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_colleges_univ_id FOREIGN KEY ("univ_id") REFERENCES university ("univ_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "university" (
  "univ_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the university */,
  "univ_name" TEXT /* Name of the university */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the university */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the university was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the university was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("univ_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, faculty member, researcher) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_demo_id FOREIGN KEY ("demo_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each generated report */,
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic data used in the report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., enrollment trend, demographic analysis) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the generated report */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the generated report in bytes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_demo_id FOREIGN KEY ("demo_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "department_demographics" (
  "dept_demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department demographic data point */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* ID of the academic department */,
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic data */,
  "dept_enrollment" INTEGER /* Number of students enrolled in the department */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* JSON column to store the distribution of students by gender in the department */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* JSON column to store the distribution of students by age groups in the department */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the department demographic data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the department demographic data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dept_demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_department_demographics_dept_id FOREIGN KEY ("dept_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_department_demographics_demo_id FOREIGN KEY ("demo_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "college_demographics" (
  "college_demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each college demographic data point */,
  "college_id" INTEGER /* ID of the academic college */,
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic data */,
  "college_enrollment" INTEGER /* Number of students enrolled in the college */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* JSON column to store the distribution of students by gender in the college */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* JSON column to store the distribution of students by age groups in the college */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the college demographic data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the college demographic data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("college_demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_college_demographics_college_id FOREIGN KEY ("college_id") REFERENCES colleges ("college_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_college_demographics_demo_id FOREIGN KEY ("demo_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "university_demographics" (
  "univ_demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each university demographic data point */,
  "univ_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university */,
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic data */,
  "univ_enrollment" INTEGER /* Total number of students enrolled at the university */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* JSON column to store the distribution of students by gender at the university level */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* JSON column to store the distribution of students by age groups at the university level */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the university demographic data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the university demographic data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("univ_demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_university_demographics_univ_id FOREIGN KEY ("univ_id") REFERENCES university ("univ_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_university_demographics_demo_id FOREIGN KEY ("demo_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demo_id")
)
